headline: Super vs Gemini — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Gemini. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Gemini

summary: Gemini is Google’s ambitious push into agentic AI, now with built‑in computer use across browser, mobile, and desktop via Gemini 3.5 Flash and products like Gemini Spark. Super takes a different angle: a personal AI agent designed for people who want durable, repeatable computer‑use workflows that get cheaper and faster over time thanks to a reusable computer-use cache. This page compares where Gemini shines, where it’s still complex or enterprise‑oriented, and why Super is often the sharper choice for everyday repeated automation.
